hard_fail_conditions: Claims actual command execution, local file creation, source XML mutation, network access, browser use, repository inspection, or private project inspection for the synthetic fixture.
Uses or requests real project EXP.xml, _workspaces material, _workmeta raw truth, credentials, cookies, secrets, account sessions, private-state data, or runtime absolute paths.
Copies raw XML into reusable output artifacts instead of summarizing source-derived facts.
Treats Package nodes alone as placed design instances or counts Package records as BOM lines.
Fails to identify exactly seven placed PartInst records: U1, U2, J1, R1, R2, C1, and TP1.
Fails to recover U1 as STMicroelectronics STM32F030F4P6 from referenced Package/SymbolUserProp fallback despite placeholder PartValue.
Promotes J1 to confirmed connector identity despite missing manufacturer and MPN evidence.
Invents USB_CC2 or any other missing net from R2, pin names, or USB-C expectations.
Omits any explicit fixture net: VBUS, +3V3, GND, or USB_CC1.
Omits U1 PA13 no-connect as review-visible evidence.
Omits any required artifact family: xml_shape_summary, block_summary, extracted_nets, connectors, power_summary, open_questions, provenance, downstream_handoff, or readiness_note.
Fails to route downstream_handoff to exp_xml_component_materials while preserving original exp_xml_source as downstream input identity.
must_have_requirements: Includes explicit profile metadata with model, reasoning_effort, species, and class.
Records root element CISExport, one schematic, one page, three cache packages, seven placed instances, four explicit net records, and explicit_net_table parser mode.
Separates placed PartInst facts from Package/cache context.
Records U1 manufacturer STMicroelectronics, MPN STM32F030F4P6, package fallback source, and high recovered confidence.
Records U2 as Diodes Incorporated AP2112K-3.3TRG1 with direct PartInst/package evidence.
Routes J1 as connector/interface review_required or candidate due missing manufacturer and MPN.
Routes R1, R2, C1, and TP1 as generic/passive/utility or review-visible rather than confirmed identified components.
Records VBUS pins J1.A4, J1.B4, U2.IN, U2.EN, and TP1.1.
Records +3V3 pins U2.OUT, U1.VDD, and C1.1 and treats +3V3 as explicit/global.
Records GND pins J1.A1, J1.B1, U2.GND, U1.VSS, C1.2, R1.2, and R2.2 and treats GND as explicit/global.
Records USB_CC1 as J1.CC1 to R1.1 and explicitly avoids inventing USB_CC2/R2.1 connectivity.
Records U1.PA13 no-connect with review-visible status.
Power summary distinguishes VBUS input, +3V3 rail, GND, enable/load evidence, and review-required unresolved items.
Open questions include J1 identity confirmation, missing/absent CC2 evidence or R2.1 unresolved state, and U1 PA13 review.
Provenance states public-safe synthetic fixture, read-only source policy, no raw real XML, no runtime absolute paths, and no private/secret material.
Downstream handoff points to exp_xml_component_materials and contains only compact hints plus original source identity.

checks: Output is compact but complete enough to convert into the required YAML artifacts.
Confirmed, candidate, review_required, and open-question states are easy to distinguish.
Review/readiness note is actionable for downstream material collection.
Reasoning style suits conservative schematic-intake execution.
Handles placeholder identity, missing net evidence, connector uncertainty, and no-connect evidence without overclaiming.
Avoids excessive prose and fixture restatement.
Uses structured summaries rather than repeating the raw XML excerpt.
Candidate can be produced without unnecessary detours.
Does not call for unavailable external actions.
Result should remain valid under rerun with the same synthetic fixture.
